mapper.select:
SELECT a.id AS airport_id, a.airport_name, a.airport_location,
p.id AS plane_id, p.model AS plane_model, p.number_of_engines, p.number_of_seats,
e.id AS employee_id, e.name AS employee_name, e.salary,
g.id AS guest_id, g.name AS guest_name, g.passport_number,
b.id AS booking_id, b.booking_number, b.booking_date,
cp.id AS payment_id, cp.payment_amount, cp.payment_date
FROM airports a
LEFT JOIN planes p ON p.airport_id = a.id
LEFT JOIN employees e ON e.airport_id = a.id
LEFT JOIN guests g ON g.plane_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN bookings b ON b.guest_id = g.id
LEFT JOIN card_payments cp ON cp.booking_id = b.id
